seoTitle: Program Management & Federal Delivery | ValorForge Solutions
seoDescription: CMMC 2.0 Level 2 Certified program management for multi-year federal contracts. ValorForge delivers disciplined project leadership, quality assurance, cybersecurity compliance, and stakeholder coordination for national-scale broadband and technology programs.

hero.headline: Disciplined Delivery for Programs That Cannot Fail
hero.subheadline: Multi-year, multimillion-dollar federal programs demand more than good intentions. They demand repeatable processes, rigorous quality assurance, and program leadership that keeps complex stakeholder environments aligned from kickoff to closeout.

sections.heading: Federal Contract Management
sections.body:
ValorForge provides program management for federal contracts where accuracy, compliance, and coordination across multiple government bureaus are non-negotiable.

Our approach is grounded in disciplined process maturity and CMMC 2.0 Level 2 Certified cybersecurity certification — ensuring that every project plan, risk register, status report, and deliverable follows documented, repeatable processes that scale from contract award through final transition-out, while maintaining the cybersecurity posture required for handling sensitive national-scale datasets.

capabilities.title: Project Management Planning
capabilities.body: Detailed project plans with timelines, milestones, staffing, risk management, subcontractor management, and communication frameworks — delivered at proposal and maintained throughout the contract lifecycle.

capabilities.title: Integrated Product Team Coordination
capabilities.body: Leading monthly and weekly coordination meetings across multiple government bureaus, offices, and stakeholder groups — synthesizing technical progress, policy implications, and program risks into actionable decision frameworks.

capabilities.title: Performance Reporting
capabilities.body: Monthly status reports covering all activities, deliverables, risks, staffing, and financial status. Meeting minutes delivered within 48 hours. Transparent, complete, and on time — every cycle.

capabilities.title: Risk Management
capabilities.body: Proactive identification, assessment, and mitigation of program risks — from data source disruptions to stakeholder coordination challenges to transition timeline compression.

capabilities.title: Subcontractor Oversight
capabilities.body: Managing multi-partner teaming arrangements with clear responsibility matrices, performance monitoring, and integrated delivery schedules.

sections.heading: Quality Assurance & Surveillance
sections.body: For national-scale datasets where a single error can redirect millions in federal funding, quality isn't a phase — it's a discipline applied to every deliverable, every release, and every interaction.

capabilities.title: QASP Development & Execution
capabilities.body: Quality Assurance Surveillance Plans that define performance objectives, monitoring methodologies, reporting cadences, and corrective action triggers — delivered with the proposal and refined throughout the contract.

capabilities.title: Data Quality Assessment
capabilities.body: Systematic evaluation of dataset completeness, accuracy of individual fields, prevalence of over-inclusion (false positives) and under-inclusion (false negatives), and version-over-version change analysis.

capabilities.title: Process Documentation
capabilities.body: Comprehensive methodology documentation describing how data is sourced, how structures are identified, how BSL determinations are made, how unit counts are estimated, and how challenges are adjudicated — written for both technical and policy audiences.

capabilities.title: Continuous Improvement
capabilities.body: Analysis of challenge patterns to identify systematic methodology issues. Root cause evaluation of significant cross-version changes. Formal proposals for data source and methodology improvements — always in consultation with the government.

sections.heading: Cybersecurity, Compliance & PII Protection
sections.body:
Broadband mapping datasets contain location-specific information for every home and business in the country. Handling this data demands rigorous cybersecurity controls, privacy protocols, and personnel security aligned with federal requirements.

ValorForge holds CMMC 2.0 Level 2 Certified certification and maintains a CMMC-AB Registered Practitioner on staff — ensuring that our cybersecurity posture meets the standards required for handling controlled unclassified information and sensitive national-scale location data throughout the contract lifecycle.

capabilities.title: CMMC 2.0 Level 2 Certified Cybersecurity Certification
capabilities.body: Verified compliance with the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification framework. Our cybersecurity practices meet the standards required for federal contracts handling sensitive data at scale.

capabilities.title: CMMC-AB Registered Practitioner
capabilities.body: In-house registered practitioner providing ongoing cybersecurity assessment, compliance monitoring, and readiness assurance — not outsourced, not ad hoc.

capabilities.title: PII Protection
capabilities.body: Protocols aligned with 5 U.S.C. § 552a and contract-specific privacy requirements. No selling, leasing, or unauthorized disclosure of personally identifiable information developed or accessed under the contract. Subcontractor flow-down provisions ensure end-to-end PII protection across the entire teaming arrangement.

capabilities.title: Security Clearance Coordination
capabilities.body: FCC Security Office onboarding within 30-day timelines. All key personnel are U.S. citizens eligible for expedited 10-day clearance processing.

capabilities.title: Federal Procurement Compliance
capabilities.body: Full FAR compliance. Transparent invoicing and financial reporting. Travel management within federal guidelines.

sections.heading: Multi-Tier License Administration
sections.body: The Broadband Fabric serves thousands of distinct users — from Tier 1 carriers to individual consumers — each with different access needs, usage rights, and compliance obligations. Managing this licensing ecosystem requires precision, responsiveness, and a deep understanding of how different stakeholders use the data.

capabilities.title: License Framework Management
capabilities.body: Development and administration of multi-tier licensing agreements for federal agencies, ISPs, state and Tribal governments, researchers, and the general public. All license content developed in consultation with and approved by the FCC.

capabilities.title: Eligibility Determination
capabilities.body: Coordination with FCC stakeholders to determine appropriate license tier for each requesting entity. Clear, documented criteria applied consistently.

capabilities.title: Dispute Resolution
capabilities.body: Direct resolution of disputes between contractor and licensees — without requiring FCC mediation. Fair, timely, and documented.

capabilities.title: Licensee Onboarding
capabilities.body: Support for new and transitioning licensees including data format guidance, access provisioning, and usage rights clarification. Scaled to serve thousands of entities across every filing cycle.

capabilities.title: Transition Continuity
capabilities.body: Ensuring all existing licensees maintain uninterrupted data access during contract transitions — with clear communication, format documentation, and dedicated support throughout the changeover period.

sections.heading: Cost Management & Optimization
sections.body: Federal broadband mapping should become more cost-effective over time — not more expensive. As new government data sources become available, they should reduce reliance on commercial data and generate real savings for the taxpayer.

capabilities.title: Cost Reduction Identification
capabilities.body: Continuous evaluation of where new government data sources — from the Census Bureau, USPS, NSDI, and other federal and state agencies — can replace commercially licensed data at lower cost.

capabilities.title: Formal Reduction Proposals
capabilities.body: When government data reduces commercial dependence, we submit formal cost reduction plans with implementation timelines and price adjustments — not just for the next option year, but proactively within the current period.

capabilities.title: Transparent Financial Reporting
capabilities.body: Clear invoicing aligned to contract CLINs, with activity-level detail that enables the government to verify value delivered against cost incurred.

footerCta.text: Let's discuss how ValorForge brings discipline to your most critical programs.
